narrative: As a Staff Machine Learning Engineer with 9 years of experience at Salesforce, this candidate stands out as our top-ranked contender due to their exceptional alignment with the Senior AI/ML Engineer role's core requirements. Their verified skill depth in Search Backend, LoRA, Search & Discovery, and Information Retrieval Systems directly addresses our need for expertise in Search & Retrieval. With experience at a leading product company and strong experience level alignment, they are an ideal fit. The primary caveat is their current location in Coimbatore, which is outside our preferred Pune/Noida regions, and their notice period is currently unknown.
